vol_description:
Home visit video data sessions collected as part of UMiami's contributions to the NIH-funded Play and Learning Across a Year (PLAY) Project. Session data consist of the following:
-Video files of 1-hour natural play, 5-minute structured play, house walk-through, and questionnaires
-Responses to questionnaires covering the participant’s demographics, language, temperament, and locomotion
-Ambient noise decibel meter recordings captured during the 1-hour natural play

vol_name: Harnessing multimodal data to enhance machine learning of children's vocalizations
vol_description: Data include 1) first person audio recordings of children and teachers in preschool classrooms for children with and without hearing loss, and 2) human annotation, and 3) automated estimation of speech and speaker diarization (child versus adult) from those recordings.

Data for all MultiNet assessments collected by the Perry Lab:
MAAP at 18, 24, 36, 48, and 60 months
IPEP at 18, 24, 36, 48, and 60 months
MB-CDI at 18 and 24 months
EVT at 36, 48, and 60 months
ITSEA at 18, 24, and 36 months
SSIS at 36, 48, and 60 months
ASQ at 18, 24, 36, 48, and 60 months

vol_name: Classroom Vocal Interactions and Engagement in Inclusive Preschools
vol_description:
Objective measurement of vocalization and movement in inclusive preschool classrooms for children with ASD, DD, or TD as a predictor of classroom engagement as measured by the inCLASS.

See parent volume of IBIS project for videos depicting classroom movement and vocalizations: https://nyu.databrary.org/volume/987

See OSF for data and analysis code used in this paper:
https://osf.io/gn6ar/
